meta.description: nlmixr2 SAEM reference for openpkpd external validation
meta.model: warfarin PK-only 1-cmt oral, IIV on KA/CL/V, prop error
meta.tolerance_notes: This benchmark is release-gated on KA, V, and proportional residual variance. CL remains a documented SAEM gap versus the nlmixr2 reference and is tracked separately rather than hidden behind loosened tolerances.
